parity.search.relevance_score.note: Search contract suite must stay green for core relevance behavior.

parity.search.rank_stability.note: Provider-backed semantic search behavior must remain stable.

parity.search.result_consistency.note: Service client search regression suite acts as the first consistency receipt.

parity.search.query_behavior_match.note: Search tool behavior must match existing query expectations.

parity.search.filter_behavior_match.note: Filter and fallback behavior must remain covered by serviceClient tests.

parity.vector.ingest_success_rate.note: Index lifecycle coverage stands in for ingest success proof.

parity.vector.retrieval_accuracy.note: Search contract suite remains the first retrieval-accuracy guard.

parity.tools.schema_match_rate.note: Core tool contract suites must stay green.

parity.tools.response_contract_match.note: Tool response contract suites must stay green.

parity.tools.error_surface_match.note: Provider and fallback error-surface tests must stay green.

parity.tools.request_id_coverage.note: Approval workflow and plan-management request-id flows must stay green.

parity.reliability.recovery_success_rate.note: Timeout and zombie recovery suites are the first recovery receipts.

parity.reliability.retry_effectiveness.note: Integration recovery suites double as retry-effectiveness evidence.

parity.reliability.fallback_safety.note: Fallback and provider-error behavior must remain green.
